VAL-CLI-001.evidence: Model files created in cache directory, exit code 0

VAL-CLI-002.testMethod: Used --cache-dir flag with temp directory, verified model saved to specified location
VAL-CLI-002.evidence: Model files placed in specified cache directory instead of default ~/.cache/llm-compress/

VAL-CLI-013.testMethod: Tested llm-compress --help and all subcommand helps
VAL-CLI-013.evidence: Help shows all commands: download, quantize, serve, list, remove, tui with descriptions

notes: All core-python CLI assertions passed. Testing was done using the Click testing framework with isolated temporary cache directories. The download test used sshleifer/tiny-gpt2 (17M parameter model) for fast, reliable testing.
